_status_line: Generated 5 image ideas · top viral_score 9/10 · 5 distinct archetypes · operators_best_bet IMG_3

informed_by.trend_cluster_used: Competitor Royal Pop wrist adapters flooding market

ideas.render_prompt: Orthographic top and side views of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome FKM rubber) on white background. Labels: '40.35mm inner socket', '0.7mm retaining lip', '22mm lug width'. Minimalist typography, flat lighting, no shadows. Ultra-sharp focus, engineering blueprint aesthetic.
ideas.negative_prompt: no Swatch logo, no AP logo, no text overlay, no gradient, no reflections, no human elements, no color
ideas.viral_reasoning: Aligns with trend cluster 'Design obsession: 40.35mm socket, 22mm lug width, FKM rubber' (audience_fit_score 8). Technical precision drives authority and shares among watch enthusiasts.
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Overly complex labels or inaccurate measurements.

ideas.render_prompt: Extreme macro shot of Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue FKM rubber) 0.7mm retaining lip snapping into Royal Pop case edge. Raking light to emphasize texture and precision. Black background, shallow depth of field. Crown notches aligned, no visible branding.
ideas.negative_prompt: no Swatch logo, no AP logo, no text, no human skin, no reflections, no motion blur
ideas.viral_reasoning: Leverages 'Royal Pop case dimensions obsession' trend (audience_fit_score 8). Macro detail sparks curiosity and aligns with proven spec-driven hooks (e.g., '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.').
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Poor focus or unrealistic lighting on FKM texture.

ideas.render_prompt: Side-by-side comparison: Cradle Adapter V1 (Cobalt Orange FKM rubber) on Royal Pop (left) vs. generic competitor adapter (right). Royal Pop flush on wrist with Cradle Adapter; competitor adapter loose, gap visible. Neutral gray background, diffused lighting. No text.
ideas.negative_prompt: no Swatch logo, no AP logo, no text overlay, no human faces, no neon, no plastic texture
ideas.viral_reasoning: Directly addresses 'Competitor Royal Pop wrist adapters flooding market' trend (audience_fit_score 10). Side-by-side contrast is proven to drive engagement and urgency (FOMO).
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Unrealistic competitor adapter or misaligned Royal Pop fit.

ideas.render_prompt: Wrist shot: Royal Pop in Cradle Adapter V1 (Green Eight FKM rubber) on light skin tone. Adapter flush, no gap. Minimalist leather strap, soft diffused lighting. Background blurred, focus on adapter and Royal Pop. No visible branding.
ideas.negative_prompt: no Swatch logo, no AP logo, no text, no jewelry, no tattoos, no harsh shadows
ideas.viral_reasoning: Taps into 'Royal Pop as pocket-watch-to-wrist conversion phenomenon' trend (audience_fit_score 9). Wrist shots drive aspiration and relatability for watch enthusiasts.
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Unnatural wrist angle or unrealistic strap integration.

ideas.render_prompt: Cradle Adapter V1 (Otto Rosso FKM rubber) next to a 22mm watch strap and a Royal Pop case. Adapter centered, strap and case slightly blurred. Soft lighting, neutral background. Emphasize scale and compatibility. No text.
ideas.negative_prompt: no Swatch logo, no AP logo, no text overlay, no reflections, no human elements, no neon
ideas.viral_reasoning: Supports 'Scarcity and waitlist triggers' trend (audience_fit_score 9). Scale frame clarifies product purpose and drives desire for compatibility.

execution_note_for_operator: Prioritize IMG_3 (side-by-side competitor contrast) for IG feed. IMG_2 (macro detail) is ideal for Reel cover. All prompts are ready for FLUX/nano_banana_2/gpt_image_2.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
